SessionStart.description: Ensure QMD HTTP daemon is running on port ${QMD_DAEMON_PORT}
Print active vault summary for session context

FileChanged.description: Re-index QMD on markdown file changes (global qmd update)

PostCompact.description: Verify QMD daemon health after context compaction

Stop.command: qmd status --json | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Index freshness: {d.get(\"document_count\",0)} docs')"
Stop.description: Report QMD index freshness on session end
